should_trigger.prompt: I'm new — walk me through the basics
Show me what this plugin can do
Help me with intro patterns in my Ruby project

should_not_trigger.prompt: Initialize the plugin for this project
Fix the bug in the controller
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: I just installed this — give me the guided tour
After fixing the bug, also check if intro needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Configure the plugin settings for this repo
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
